rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend for last time to allege in good faith with particularity wrongful acts and breaches by MERS. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT MORTGAGEIT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Defendant MortgageIT assigned contract at time of alleged breach and Cutting Packing does not support plaintiff's argument that assignor always responsible for breach. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BILL MOOMEY VS. CHASE BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 2. Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Sustain without leave to amend. Opposing party failed to comply with 11-14-2012 court order and provide courtesy copy of opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIUS BRIGGS VS. MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, LP, ALTAMONT HOTEL, INC.,and CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions. Continued to January 10, 2012 at 9:30 AM, on court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IRMA ENCINAS VS. ASSET FORECLOSURE SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs ASSET FORECLOSURE SERVICES, INC., and BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Causes of action 1, 2 and 3: Sustain with leave to allege unconditional tender. Causes of action 4, 5 and 6: Overrule 1) Moving party proves no authority that escrow holder owes no fiduciary duty. Since cause of action 5 stands, 4 & 6 will stand. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHING KIT LEE et al VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S To Further Respond To Interrogatories Of Pltf'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories, And To Pay The Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFFs SHING LEE and JULIE LEE's Motion To Compel Defendants To Further Respond To Interrogatories Of Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories, And To Pay The Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs Of The Motion. Defendant shall serve verified responses with further responses to 70.13 and 79.1, no later than December 12, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CINDY OILAR, TRUSTEE OF THE SILVIO L. SCOCCA 1996 VS. ANTHONY BICKEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2012, line 9. PLAINTIFF CINDY OILAR, TRUSTEE OF THE SILVIO L. SCOCCA 1996 REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule as to 2, 3 and 7. Affirmitive defenses sufficiently pleads ulitimate facts. Sustain with leave to amend as to 15 to allege reliance. Sustain without leave to amend as to 9, previously so ordered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CINDY OILAR, TRUSTEE OF THE SILVIO L. SCOCCA 1996 VS. ANTHONY BICKEL et al
